text: I am very disappointed with the delay in resolving my refund request. This is not what I expected.
I feel disappointed after using your product, as it does not function as described. I would like to express my concerns.

I am writing to formally request a refund for an item I purchased, which unfortunately was not what I expected at all. There were discrepancies in the product description that made it quite challenging to determine its actual features, leading to my dissatisfaction. If possible, I would appreciate the process for getting my funds returned.

I am experiencing a bizarre scenario where the program continuously throws an unknown error when executing routine functions. This has led to lost data and is causing me extreme stress as deadlines approach.
How many months until my next payment? I might have missed the info.
